parser_claim: Cantonese 咗 is a postverbal perfective/viewpoint-aspect marker; it is not itself a past-tense suffix.
source_proposition: The grammar introduces 咗 and 過 as aspect markers, warns against equating them with past tense, and contrasts result/current relevance under 咗 with experiential 過.
implementation_effect: Retain an overt perfective-aspect analysis for 咗 while keeping temporal interpretation separate from the node label.
forbidden_inference: Do not gloss every 咗 event as simple past, completion, current relevance, or resultant state without lexical and discourse evidence.

parser_claim: Cantonese 咗 is a postverbal perfective/viewpoint-aspect marker; it is not itself a past-tense suffix.

implementation_effect: Retain an overt perfective-aspect analysis for 咗 while keeping temporal interpretation separate from the node label.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the authors’ HPSG type hierarchy as uniquely established or assume that every occurrence has identical event semantics.

parser_claim: A simple overt verb + 咗 + object profile is independently described in Cantonese.
exact_locator: Unit 18, printed pp. 93-96; PDF pp. 105-108; examples including sé-jó yāt pīn mán and máaih-jó nī jek pàaihjí
source_proposition: The reference gives multiple V-咗-O examples and interprets them aspectually rather than as a special completion-complement construction.
implementation_effect: Retain the overt simple V-咗-O subtype as source-linked.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer unrestricted verb-object combinations, semantic uniformity, or that every V-咗 sequence has an overt or recoverable object.

parser_claim: A simple overt verb + 咗 + object profile is independently described in Cantonese.
source_proposition: 我食咗麵 instantiates V-OAP with perfective 咗 before the overt object.
implementation_effect: Retain the overt simple V-咗-O subtype as source-linked.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote the paper’s illustrative subset into an unrestricted productive parser rule.

parser_claim: When an inner endpoint/result element precedes perfective 咗, the documented surface order is V + inner element + 咗 + overt object.
exact_locator: PDF p. 3; example (2c) and ordering statement immediately above it
source_proposition: The paper states V-IAP-OAP ordering and gives 我食完(咗)麵, treating 完 as event-linked inner material and 咗 as outer perfective.
implementation_effect: Preserve overt order and represent perfective over an already formed endpoint/result predicate for this subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that 完, 飽, 好, 到, 掂, or 晒 are interchangeable or that the exact inner/outer taxonomy is exhaustive.

parser_claim: When an inner endpoint/result element precedes perfective 咗, the documented surface order is V + inner element + 咗 + overt object.
source_proposition: The published example 佢食完咗啲飯 independently attests 完 before 咗 and the overt object.
implementation_effect: Preserve V完咗O as an attested surface profile.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer universal speaker preference, free lexical substitution, or a uniquely correct constituency from one example.

parser_claim: When an inner endpoint/result element precedes perfective 咗, the documented surface order is V + inner element + 咗 + overt object.
source_proposition: 琴日佢做完(咗)功課喇 independently attests V完(咗)O and optionality of 咗 in that past-time sentence.
implementation_effect: Preserve V完咗O as an attested surface profile while keeping 咗 overt and optionality construction-specific.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that 咗 is semantically vacuous, freely optional in all V完O clauses, or acceptable to every speaker in every lexical context.

parser_claim: Final 未 can form a yes/no question from an overt 咗-marked predicate, but the aspect marker remains part of the predicate.
exact_locator: Unit 18, printed pp. 95-96; PDF pp. 107-108; Unit 23, printed pp. 122-123; PDF pp. 134-135
source_proposition: The source gives Léih sīk-jó dāng meih a? and describes answers that repeat verb+咗.
implementation_effect: Allow an explicitly perfective predicate to license a final-未 question subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat final 未 as proof that an unmarked preceding VP is perfective or insert an unspoken 咗.

parser_claim: The current PerfectiveVP umbrella combines simple V-咗-O, objectless V-咗, perfective-over-completion/result, placement, and motion-goal paths; these are not one source-established construction.
source_proposition: Runtime inspection shows multiple semantic and argument-structural profiles sharing one label, including an objectless template whose note permits a context-linked object interpretation.
implementation_effect: Before any future implementation, distinguish at least simple overt-object, overtly objectless, perfective-over-inner-result, placement, and motion-goal subtypes; preserve overt tokens and do not insert omitted arguments.
forbidden_inference: Do not present the proposed split as an externally named taxonomy or change runtime behavior in this research batch.

parser_claim: Postverbal 完 can add an endpoint to an event and may precede outer perfective 咗.
exact_locator: PDF pp. 2-3; discussion of 完 and example (2c)
source_proposition: The paper treats 完 as an event-linked inner particle that adds an endpoint to the activity and gives 食完(咗)麵.
implementation_effect: Retain a narrow overt V完 endpoint/completion subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every lexical use of 完 is grammaticalized inner aspect or that endpoint addition alone determines all argument and discourse boundaries.

parser_claim: Cantonese postverbal endpoint/result material is heterogeneous; 完, result-state complements, and outer aspect must not be collapsed into one undifferentiated completion marker class.
source_proposition: The paper distinguishes outer aspect from individual-predicative and event-linked inner material, and explicitly notes that the simple resultative/phase dichotomy is problematic.
implementation_effect: Keep completion/phase, result-state, and outer-aspect layers visibly distinct in future representation.
forbidden_inference: Do not adopt the paper’s exact three-way HPSG inventory as exhaustive or classify every current runtime completion_marker by analogy.

parser_claim: Cantonese postverbal endpoint/result material is heterogeneous; 完, result-state complements, and outer aspect must not be collapsed into one undifferentiated completion marker class.
source_proposition: The source distinguishes verbal particles such as 飽 and 完 from aspect markers 咗 and 過 when describing completion questions.
implementation_effect: Preserve a distinction between completion/result material and outer aspect in parser-facing claims.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a complete theoretical classification or place 晒 in the same category without separate evidence.

parser_claim: The current CompletionVP label conflates V完, V完O, V完咗O, and V晒 while separately routing some overt result states to ResultComplementVP.
source_proposition: Runtime inspection finds one label spanning phase completion and totality completion, with different argument profiles; external sources in this batch support 完 and distinguish result/aspect layers but do not map the 晒 branch.
implementation_effect: Split at least phase_endpoint_完, totality_晒, and outer-perfective composition before any future design; keep 晒 unmapped pending dedicated research.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that the unmapped 晒 subtype is ungrammatical, equivalent to 完, or authorized for removal.

parser_claim: The current inner CompletionVP under outer PerfectiveVP is a defensible representation for V完咗O, but it cannot authorize the broader CompletionVP umbrella.
exact_locator: main.js lines 13508-13552; legacy audit rows for CompletionVP and PerfectiveVP
source_proposition: The composition preserves overt V-完-咗-O order and no hidden object, aligning with the source-derived inner-before-outer boundary for this subtype.
implementation_effect: Retain this as a future remediation/design candidate only; no runtime change is authorized.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert representational alignment into native structural-analysis validation or productive grammar status.

parser_claim: Cantonese final 未 forms a completion/not-yet question when the preceding predicate contains an overt completion/result particle or aspect marker.
source_proposition: The source states that completion may be signalled by verbal particles such as 飽 and 完 or by aspect markers 咗 and 過 before final 未.
implementation_effect: Retain a final-未 question family whose licensing source is overtly represented in the predicate.
forbidden_inference: Do not license the construction solely from verb adjacency or final 未, and do not insert a hidden completion/aspect marker.

parser_claim: Attested final-未 subtypes include V飽未, V完未, V咗…未, and V過…未; they are not semantically identical.
exact_locator: Unit 18, printed pp. 95-96; PDF pp. 107-108; Unit 23, printed pp. 122-123; PDF pp. 134-135
source_proposition: Examples include Léih sihk báau meih a?, Ngóhdeih wáan yùhn meih a?, Léih sīk-jó dāng meih a?, and experiential gwo questions.
implementation_effect: Record overt completion/result, perfective, and experiential subtypes rather than one undifferentiated “finished-yet” meaning.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse experiential “ever” questions into completion, or claim that all final-未 questions ask the same semantic question.

parser_claim: The reviewed source does not justify an unrestricted bare VP or generic productive-VO predicate before final 未 as a completion question.
source_proposition: The description explicitly attributes the reading to visible completion/result particles or aspect markers and illustrates only such licensed predicates.
implementation_effect: Narrow the language claim to overtly licensed predicates; quarantine the current bare-reviewed-VO extension pending independent evidence.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat absence of support as proof that every bare-VP+未 string is impossible; the conclusion is a parser-authorization boundary, not a universal ungrammaticality claim.

parser_claim: The runtime category template requires CompletionVP, but the fallback additionally accepts PerfectiveVP, ProductiveVO, generic VP slots, literal 完/咗, or a bare reviewed VO before 未.
source_proposition: Runtime inspection confirms a source-linked core plus a broader unsupported fallback, including an explicit “bare reviewed VO” branch.
implementation_effect: Future remediation should require an overt completion/result/aspect licensing subtype and keep experiential distinct; do not change code in R6.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat a parser slot label as evidence that the underlying Cantonese predicate has completion semantics.
